services.title: Business Analysis & Development
services.subtitle: Management & Government Solutions
services.description: Comprehensive business analysis and development services for management and government sectors. Transform complex requirements into actionable strategies.
services.longDescription: I provide expert business analysis and development services tailored for management and government entities. From requirement gathering to process optimization, I help organizations achieve their strategic goals through data-driven decision making and efficient workflows.

services.title: Web Development & Portfolios
services.subtitle: Startup & Organizational Solutions
services.description: Professional web development services for startups and organizations. Build modern, responsive websites and portfolios that drive engagement.
services.longDescription: I specialize in creating high-performance web applications and stunning portfolios for startups and established organizations. Using cutting-edge technologies, I deliver solutions that are fast, secure, and scalable to help you establish a strong online presence.

services.title: Data Analysis & Power BI
services.subtitle: Monthly & Annual Reporting
services.description: Professional data analysis services using Excel, SQL, and Python. Create insightful Power BI dashboards and reports.
services.longDescription: Transform raw data into actionable insights with my comprehensive data analysis services. I specialize in creating interactive Power BI dashboards, automated Excel reports, and data pipelines using SQL and Python. Perfect for monthly and annual reporting needs.
